MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Melanie Bynum, 415-570-3273, defendant and moving party appearing propria persona

RULING:
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANT MELANIE BYNUM'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH 5 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND TO PLEAD FACT ESTABLISHING EXCEPTION FROM THE RENT ACT. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 (301/PJB)
